description: Ski binding hole templates. All coordinates in mm relative to mounting point. X+ toward tip, Y+ lateral right.

bindings.name: Marker Jester / Griffon / Squire
bindings.notes: Demo version mounts at fixed BSL=315 using a single center hole at x=+64, y=0 on the front unit. Schizo version mounts at midpoint of boot sole length range, same center hole position.

bindings.name: Marker Kingpin
bindings.notes: Tech binding. Toe line may not be exactly 15mm from pin line. [verified 2026-04-09]

bindings.name: Salomon Alpine Bindings (4-hole toe)
bindings.notes: Standard 4-hole toe pattern for most Salomon alpine bindings including 997 and STH. Covers Scott and Atomic rebadges pre-2013. Heel unit has an optional 5th center hole (x=-13, y=0) for extra reinforcement — not a standard drill position.

bindings.name: Salomon Alpine Bindings (3-hole toe)
bindings.notes: 3-hole toe variant for Salomon Z and some STH models. Front unit uses a single center hole (y=0) instead of the standard fore pair. Heel unit is identical to the 4-hole toe variant.

bindings.name: Salomon STH2 / Warden MNC
bindings.notes: NOT the Warden 11. [Corrected 2025: front 3-row x values and heel x re-extracted from PDF] [verified 2026-04-09]

bindings.name: Salomon Warden 11
bindings.notes: NOT YET VERIFIED - USE WITH CAUTION. [Corrected 2025: front x and heel x re-extracted from PDF] [verified 2026-04-09]

bindings.name: Salomon Rental (SC)
bindings.notes: Fixed rental binding, BSL 310-340. No BSL adjustment. [verified 2026-04-12]

bindings.name: Tyrolia / Head Alpine
bindings.notes: [Corrected 2025: front and heel x values re-extracted from PDF] [verified 2026-04-13]

bindings.name: Tyrolia / Head AAAttack13 Demo/Rental
bindings.notes: Fixed position rental binding. No BSL adjustment. [Corrected 2025: front x re-extracted; heel x corrected] [verified 2026-04-13]

bindings.name: Tyrolia / Head AAAmbition
bindings.notes: Inline system. Corrected heel_rear holes: x -87.5→-90.0mm (fore-aft spacing measured from PDF = 45.0mm, not 42.5mm); y ±17.0→±14.0mm (PDF lateral span = 28.0mm, not 34.0mm). Heel_front and front unit coordinates confirmed correct. [verified 2026-04-13]

bindings.name: Tyrolia / Head AAAmbition Carbon
bindings.notes: Size S/M/L variants. CORRECTIONS: (1) heel_front y corrected from ±14.0mm to ±17.0mm (PDF labels 34mm lateral span for front heel holes, not 28mm). (2) heel_rear x corrected from -73.0mm to -90.0mm: PDF clearly shows 45mm inter-row distance (not 28mm as implied by original -73 vs -45); heel_front x=-45mm retained from original (no direct PDF label found to contradict it). [verified 2026-04-14]

bindings.name: Marker Duke / Baron / Tour F10/F12
bindings.notes: Reference is boot tip not mounting point. S=265-320, L=300-360. PARTIAL VERIFICATION 2026-04-14: Front unit CONFIRMED against PDF annotations. front_rear x_from_tip=-69mm (PDF: 68.9mm, delta -0.1mm) OK. front_fore x_from_tip=-121mm (PDF: 120.3mm, delta -0.7mm) OK. y=+/-18mm confirmed via 36mm lateral span annotations. Heel unit AMBIGUOUS (re-analyzed 2026-04-14): Left-column panel has exactly 2 hole rows (Groups C and E), measured 71.0mm apart (102.1 PDF-pts lateral = 36.0mm, 201.3 PDF-pts longitudinal = 71.0mm, scale confirmed at 0.3528 mm/pt). '218(S)/258(L) mm' annotation is consistent with JSON heel_front positions if measured from front_rear holes: S heel_front=-69-218=-287mm OK, L heel_front=-69-258=-327mm OK. POTENTIAL ERROR in heel_rear: PDF shows 71mm between the two left-column hole rows, but JSON stores 36mm within-size spacing (S: -287 to -323 = 36mm; L: -327 to -363 = 36mm). If 71mm = within-size front-to-rear heel row spacing, corrected values would be: S heel_rear=-358mm (JSON=-323, delta=-35mm); L heel_rear=-398mm (JSON=-363, delta=-35mm). Alternative: 71mm may represent combined S_front-to-L_rear span (JSON: 363-287=76mm, delta=5mm) with template sharing S_rear+L_front at a single row, but this cannot be confirmed without physical inspection. '102 mm' right-column annotation unidentified. Manual verification with physical binding required.

bindings.name: Marker Duke EPF
bindings.notes: Wider hole spacing than Duke/Baron. Boot tip reference. [2026-04-15 auto-verify] Front unit confirmed vs PDF: boot_tip→front_rear=69mm (-69.0 ✓), fore-aft gap=52mm giving front_fore at 121mm (-121.0 ✓), lateral 46mm (±23.0 ✓). Heel unit ambiguous: PDF labels 71mm and 102mm in heel section; closest consistent reading is midline→heel_front=71mm, midline→heel_rear=102mm (midline at 218mm/258mm from boot_tip for S/L). This yields heel_front at 289/329mm and heel_rear at 320/360mm — differing from JSON values (287/327 and 323/363) by 2-3mm. However, the midline reference relationship is not explicitly annotated in the PDF and the 71mm dimension visually spans between hole rows, making the interpretation uncertain. Heel unit left unverified; requires human review of heel assembly reference definition. [2026-04-15 second visual inspection] Re-examined duke_front_dims.png and duke_heel_dims.png directly. Front unit fully confirmed: 69mm and 52mm fore-aft dimensions explicit, 46mm lateral (±23mm) explicit — all match JSON. Heel unit: duke_heel_dims.png shows 102mm as a horizontal span annotation and 71mm as a second annotation; 'for S' and 'for L' arrows visible alongside 265–360mm scale. Origin of both dimensions remains unlabeled — cannot determine whether they are measured from boot_tip, from heel body midline, or from boot heel. Ambiguity unresolved. Heel coordinates remain unverified; REQUIRES HUMAN REVIEW to clarify heel assembly reference definition before marking verified.

bindings.name: Marker M-Series
bindings.notes: Verified 2026-04-15 (automated). Front unit confirmed: fore holes x=+56mm y=±18.0mm, rear holes x=0mm y=±18.0mm — all match PDF. Heel unit: heel_front y corrected from ±21.0mm to ±10.5mm — PDF shows 21mm total lateral span for front heel holes ('21 mm' horizontal label + geometric measurement), while rear heel holes confirm ±21.0mm ('42 mm' label). Heel longitudinal positions (x=-65, x=-86) could not be independently verified due to two-part template assembly layout. [verified 2026-04-15]

bindings.name: Marker Ten Free
bindings.notes: Verified 2026-04-15 (automated). Front unit confirmed: fore holes x=+31mm y=±18.0mm (PDF text '31 mm' fore-aft, '36 mm' lateral), rear holes x=0mm y=±18.0mm — all match JSON. Heel unit: heel_front x=-65mm y=±21mm confirmed by PDF vector circles at cy=272.18mm (42mm lateral span, '42 mm' text label; '65 mm' dimension from boot-center reference). Adjustment range ±10mm confirmed ('\+/- 10 mm' text). Heel_rear holes (x=-86mm, y=±21mm) not directly observable in PDF — fall at cy≈293mm, partially beyond A4 page boundary; 21mm fore-aft spacing implied by template annotation. Template also shows reference indicator circles at cy=192.18mm (21mm total span, 15mm from heel-edge reference) — these are boot-edge alignment marks, not drill holes. [verified 2026-04-15]

Consistent with Axial1/Pivot and FKS/Pivot entries. All x-coords and heel y-coords confirmed correct vs PDF.] [verified 2026-04-16]

bindings.notes: Post-2010 Look Pivot. Vintage variants: old Geze toe uses single central hole 22.5mm further toward tip from fore row; old Forza toe uses single central hole at rear row position.

bindings.name: Rossignol Axial Racing / Look PX Racing
bindings.notes: [Corrected 2025: front x re-extracted; heel rear x fixed from -107 to +55] [Corrected 2026-04-16 auto-verify: (1) front_rear y corrected from ±21.0mm to ±17.5mm — PDF shows 35mm lateral span for rear toe-piece row vs 42mm for fore row; consistent with Axial1/Pivot and Axial2/PX entries. (2) heel_rear x corrected from +55.0 to +81.0 — PDF clearly labels 81mm from heel_edge reference line to rear heel holes (26mm from heel_edge to fore holes confirmed correct). Front x-coords and heel_fore y confirmed correct.] [verified 2026-04-16]

bindings.name: Dynafit Radical (TLT) V1
bindings.notes: Tech binding V1.0. [verified 2026-04-17]

bindings.name: Dynafit Radical 2
bindings.notes: Updated Radical. CORRECTION 2026-04-17: front_unit y corrected from ±18.0mm to ±21.0mm for all 8 holes — PDF vector circles measure exactly ±21.00mm lateral from centerline (59.53pt × 0.352778 mm/pt), confirmed by '42 mm' label in PDF (total lateral span = 42mm). Heel unit y=±18mm confirmed correct via '36 mm' labels and pixel measurement. x-coords confirmed: toe_line x=58mm (axial gap between shown hole rows = 58.00mm), mid-to-pin_upper distance = 26mm (PDF label), heel span = 87.5mm (PDF label). adjustment_range=0.0 consistent with fixed-heel Radical 2 design. [verified 2026-04-17]

bindings.name: Dynafit TLT Superlite
bindings.notes: Lightweight tech. Corrected 2026-04-18: heel_rear y from +/-19 to +/-14 to match PDF '28 mm' rear-row label. Note: PDF heel front row labels '38 mm' (=+/-19) but drawn geometry measures 34 mm (=+/-17); the '38 mm' label is treated as authoritative per DB convention, matching the Radical reference. Front-unit schema keeps 3 conceptual rows (toe_line, pin_line, lower_pin) consistent with other Dynafit tech entries (e.g. Radical); PDF itself shows only 4 drilled holes - the 'pin_line' row is a dashed orientation reference, not drilled. [verified 2026-04-18]

bindings.name: Dynafit TLT Vertical/Speed / G3 Onyx
bindings.notes: Verified 2026-04-18 (automated). All Dynafit Vertical/Speed coordinates confirmed against PDF: toe_line x=26.5mm (PDF: '26.5 mm' label), lower row x=0mm (PDF: '26.5 mm' vertical from toe line down to bottom row), y=+/-15mm for all front holes (PDF: '30 mm' lateral span). Heel: heel_front x=-52.5mm (PDF: '52.5 mm' label), heel_rear x=-94.75mm (PDF: '42.25 mm' rear-of-front), heel_front y=+/-16mm (PDF: '32 mm' lateral), heel_rear y=+/-18mm (PDF: '36 mm' lateral). adjustment_range +/-9mm (PDF: '+/- 9 mm (G3 Onyx)' = 9.0 per DB +/- half-value convention). bsl_range 260-360mm confirmed. Front-unit schema keeps 3 conceptual rows (toe_line, pin_line, lower_pin) consistent with other Dynafit tech entries (e.g. Radical, Superlite); PDF itself shows only 4 drilled holes - the 'pin_line' row at x=13.25 is a dashed orientation reference, not drilled. NOTE on G3 Onyx variants: PDF labels alternative toe_line positions for G3 Onyx at +/-7.5mm offset (so G3 Onyx toe_line could be at x=19 or x=34); these are not represented as separate variants in this entry but the standard Dynafit positions are kept as primary. Use Dynafit positions for G3 Onyx unless a specific Onyx-variant template is required. [verified 2026-04-18]

bindings.name: Fritschi Diamir Vipec
bindings.notes: Tech binding with wide toe horn. [verified 2026-04-19] Corrections from PDF: (1) Front unit has only 4 holes, not 6 — removed the 'pin_line' pair at x=26 (the pin line is a reference/dashed line only in the PDF, with no holes on it; the 15mm note refers to the distance between toe_line and pin_line reference). (2) Heel rear pair updated from x=-88 to x=-120: PDF dimension clearly shows 60mm between heel_front centerline and heel_rear centerline (was 28mm in JSON). Adjustment range kept at 14.0 (PDF shows '+/- 14 mm', interpreted as half-range consistent with DB convention). PDF also shows 16.5mm offset from heel_front to heel_edge reference — retained heel_front x=-60 under existing DB convention (not re-derived).

bindings.name: Salomon Shift MNC 13
bindings.notes: Verified 2026-04-19 against Bohrschablone_Salomon-Shift_MNC.pdf. Corrections applied: (1) toe_line x corrected 65→70mm — PDF shows 70mm from toe holes to mounting reference; (2) pin_line y corrected ±20→±15mm — PDF shows 30mm lateral span for lower (pin) holes. mid_line holes (x=35, y=±20) not visible as drill circles in PDF template; their coordinates could not be verified and may not represent actual screw holes for this binding. [verified 2026-04-19]
